commit.message:
LU-16954 test: fortestonly to verify commit f5a75ea

Verify if commit f5a75ea causes this failure on Ubuntu2204 client.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly clientdistro=ubuntu2204 testlist=sanity,conf-sanity
